title: Backrooms Pisodo
description: A mod that adds levels from backrooms. Goes to Forge and NeoForge loaders
body:
Backrooms Pisodo mod goes to Forge and NeoForge loaders

The mod currently adds level 0, in the future it is planned to add other levels, as many of them as possible. I don't plan to add entities, at least not any time soon. To get into backrooms, you just need to fall into the void

But I need YOU, YOU can help develop the mod if you know how to write mods in Java. Together we can make more advanced and interesting mods, I myself will not be able to reach such a high level, at least for now, so I need help in the form of a java coder for the team

You can support me here https://www.patreon.com/livechamomile or here https://boosty.to/liveromashka, there I post the mod a little earlier and share the process of developing the mod, as well as other additional content. Monetary support gives me the opportunity to continue working on mods for you
